entities.name: V
entities.context: The user being assisted through the weekly review process

entities.name: Weekly Review
entities.context: Recurring reflection session to zoom out and assess the week

entities.name: Operator
entities.context: Persona to switch back to after completing the review

entities.name: journal.py
entities.context: Script at N5/scripts/journal.py for saving journal entries to database

entities.name: Anchor
entities.context: Practice of helping V feel grounded going into the new week

entities.name: Save Protocol
entities.context: Procedure for compiling and persisting weekly review summaries

entities.name: N5
entities.context: System containing scripts and infrastructure for V's knowledge management

relationships.context: V participates in weekly reviews to reflect and plan
Anchoring is a key step in the weekly review process
Protocol executes journal.py to persist review content
Saving is the final step of the weekly review
Journal script is part of the N5 system infrastructure
Review concludes by switching back to Operator persona
